name: David Green
title: Founder & CEO of Hobby Lobby
bio: American billionaire businessman, founder of Hobby Lobby, the largest privately-owned arts and crafts retailer in the world with over 1,000 stores.
faith: Green's Christian faith is the foundation of Hobby Lobby's business practices. The company closes on Sundays, plays Christian music in stores, and pays above minimum wage. Green also founded the Museum of the Bible in Washington, D.C., and has committed to giving away 90% of his wealth.
